## Description

Brief summary of the changes and why they're needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run the test suite (`uv run pytest` / `npm run test`) and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run the linter and type checker (`ruff check` / `npm run lint`) with no errors
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation in `docs/` for any user-facing or API changes
- [ ] My changes follow the project's code style conventions

## Related issues

Link any related issues here (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain the visual changes.
